[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01100000 2
1 01101001 4
2 11110000 4
3 01010111 5
4 11101111 7
5 11111011 7
6 11110111 7
7 11111111 a

01 00100100 2
12 00100000 1
23 00101000 2
34 00000000 a
45 10011111 6
56 00001001 2
67 00000110 2
70 10111100 5

02 11111011 7 match 5
13 11110111 7 match 6
24 11010111 6
35 01100000 2 match 0

57 11110000 4 match 2
60 01000101 3
71 01100111 5

14 00001000 1

72 10111000 4

75 11110000 4 match 2
